Narrated by ʿUmar ibn al-Khattab (RA): Jibrīl (ʿAS) came to the Prophet ﷺ and asked, "Tell me about īmān." He ﷺ said: "It is to believe in Allah, His Angels, His Books, His Messengers, the Last Day, and to believe in the Divine Decree — its good and its evil." (Sahih Muslim 8; the meaning is also in Sahih al-Bukhari 50)
